notes: Executable scenarios live in scenarios/shift_rotation.py and scenarios/live/shift_rotation.py.
The Scenario dataclass has no tags field in this checkout, so tier and adversarial markers are catalog metadata plus description markers.
Registered in the LifeOpsBench static and live scenario registries in this PR.

scenarios.title: Capture night shift pattern starting Monday
scenarios.coverage: Plain statement of nights starting Monday updates planning assumptions.

scenarios.title: Protect post-shift sleep window
scenarios.coverage: Protects a post-night-shift sleep window as quiet hours.

scenarios.title: Normalize D/E/N rotation pattern
scenarios.coverage: Normalizes D D E E N N off week pattern.

scenarios.title: Re-anchor recurring reminders to new shift
scenarios.coverage: Moves existing recurring reminders relative to evening shifts without re-entry.

scenarios.title: Tomorrow resolves against shift boundary
scenarios.coverage: Resolves tomorrow after a night shift against shift boundary rather than midnight.

scenarios.title: Quiet hours move with rotation
scenarios.coverage: Keeps protected sleep moving with day/evening/night rotation.

scenarios.title: Lenient planning after forward rotation
scenarios.coverage: Avoids stacking errands immediately after a forward rotation change.

scenarios.title: Dedup habit definition across shift change
scenarios.coverage: Reanchors hydration habit for nights without creating a duplicate.

scenarios.title: Sleep-window conflict must be flagged and fail closed without confirmation
scenarios.coverage: Verbatim issue exemplar for failing closed when a requested event conflicts with protected sleep.

scenarios.title: Plan transition from nights to days
scenarios.coverage: Plans recovery sleep while moving from nights to a Monday day shift.

scenarios.title: Replan after a shift swap
scenarios.coverage: Confirmed shift swap cascades through surrounding sleep and family windows.

scenarios.title: Adjust meds across rotating weeks
scenarios.coverage: Medication reminder follows wake timing across evening and night rotations.

scenarios.title: Protect recovery sleep around family event
scenarios.coverage: Balances a family event with post-night-shift recovery sleep.

scenarios.title: Triage short-notice overtime request
scenarios.coverage: Staffing overtime request during protected sleep must be triaged safely.

scenarios.title: Create week-at-a-time shift brief
scenarios.coverage: Weekly post-handoff brief covers rotation, sleep, meds, and family conflicts.

scenarios.title: Find focus block between evening shifts
scenarios.coverage: Finds one admin focus block before evening shift without cutting into sleep, commute, or meal prep.
